chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 1543 of 2015 ___________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge(s) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of CMA No.1933/2016. 2. For hearing of CMA No.6738/2015. 3. For hearing of main case. 07.02.2025 Mr. Anwer Kshif Mumtaz, advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Ameer Nausherwan Adil, advocate for the respondent. Ms. Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General. Counsel for the respondent department states that the impugned notice is being withdrawn. In view of this material representation counsel for the petitioner states that petition may be disposed of. Order accordingly. Judge ` Judge Khuhro/PA
